case_title: FURROW, IRVIN A. VS PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FURROW, IRVIN A.
